# Qadam Flow

> Open-source workflow automation, built by the region for the region.
> Localised, self-hosted, free of paid tiers and enterprise paywalls.
> The inaugural AI Qadam Build project.

Qadam Flow is a visual workflow automation platform — connect apps and
services with drag-and-drop flows. It is forked from the MIT-licensed
[Activepieces](https://github.com/activepieces/activepieces) core, with
enterprise code removed and Central-Asia-first localisation and integrations
prioritised in its place.

The product code lives at
`https://github.com/aiqadam/qadam-flow`. This site
(`https://flow.aiqadam.org/`) is the public landing.

## What it is

- **Open-source workflow automation** — visual builder, no code required.
- **Self-hosted** — Docker image, Helm chart, your infrastructure. Data
  never leaves the perimeter.
- **Localised** — UI in Russian, Uzbek, Kazakh, English. Localisation is
  ongoing.
- **Regional integrations** — Payme, Click, Uzum, Kaspi, and local APIs
  are priority work, not "someday" tickets.
- **No enterprise paywall** — SSO, RBAC, audit logs are roadmap items,
  never paid features.
- **MIT licensed.**

## Key pages

- [Landing — flow.aiqadam.org](https://flow.aiqadam.org/): the canonical
  public page, with the why, the feature list, a Docker quickstart, and
  honest status of the project.
- [Source repository](https://github.com/aiqadam/qadam-flow): code,
  issues, roadmap, contributing guide, governance.
- [Roadmap](https://github.com/aiqadam/qadam-flow/blob/main/ROADMAP.md):
  what is built, what is in progress, what is on the radar.
- [Contributing](https://github.com/aiqadam/qadam-flow/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md):
  how to write a piece, translate the UI, or report a bug.
- [Governance](https://github.com/aiqadam/qadam-flow/blob/main/GOVERNANCE.md):
  how decisions are made; DCO; no copyright assignment.

## Relationship to AI Qadam

Qadam Flow is the first project recognised as **AI Qadam Build** —
community-stewarded open-source software built by AI Qadam practitioners.
Recognition is granted by community leads (council of country leads +
Global Board). It is not a brand a partner can buy.

- AI Qadam community: `https://aiqadam.org`
- AI Qadam Brand Guidelines: `https://brand.aiqadam.org`
- AI Qadam Build accelerator: `https://build.aiqadam.org`

## What stage it is at

Early. Honest about it. The MIT core of Activepieces has been forked and
cleaned of enterprise code; localisation and regional integrations are the
current focus. Enterprise functions (SSO / RBAC / audit) are built as real
deployments need them, not on a fixed schedule. Maintained by AI Qadam,
under the founder's stewardship today but structured to belong to the
community over time (DCO, no copyright assignment).

## Important constraints

- AI Qadam brand assets (name, marks, wordmark, four-dot motif, brand teal
  as primary brand colour) used on this site are NOT covered by Qadam
  Flow's MIT licence — they remain © AI Qadam Community and are governed
  by the [Brand Usage Policy](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand-use.html).
- "AI Qadam Build" status cannot be self-declared by forks. Recognition
  is granted by community leads.
- The product is open-source under MIT. The brand is not.

## Contact

- For partnership, chapter, or brand-use questions:
  `brand@aiqadam.org`
- For Qadam Flow product and contribution questions: open an issue on
  GitHub.
